question:
Will CRWD's market close price on 2026-06-28 be higher than its market close price on 2026-06-21?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

Resolution criteria: Resolves to the market close price at https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/CRWD for the resolution date. If the resolution date coincides with a day the market is closed (weekend, holiday, etc.) the previous market close price is used.

Background: CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. provides cybersecurity solutions in the United States and internationally. Its unified platform provides cloud-delivered protection of endpoints, cloud workloads, identity, and data through a software as a service (SaaS) subscription-based model. The company offers corporate endpoint and cloud workload security, managed security, security and vulnerability management, IT operations management, identity protection, threat intelligence, data protection, SaaS security posture management, and AI powered workflow automation, and securing generative AI workload services, as well as security orchestration, automation, and response; and security information and event management, and log management services. It primarily sells subscriptions to its Falcon platform and cloud modules. The company has a strategic alliance with Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation to help enterprises secure artificial intelligence across its lifecycle, from the AI agents and models to the foundational infrastructure that supports the entire AI ecosystem. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Austin, Texas.

evidences.title: CrowdStrike Holdings (CRWD): +41% Surge in 30 Days on AI Security Momentum and Analyst Upgrades
evidences.content: ## Quarterly Performance: What Fueled the Uptrend The quarterly advance mirrored sustained demand for cybersecurity solutions, even amid macroeconomic resilience and industry tailwinds. Earlier dips from elevated valuations and sector selloffs reversed after Q4 FY2026 earnings on March 3, which exceeded estimates with $1.31 billion in revenue (up 23% year-over-year) and $1.12 EPS. Institutional confidence grew alongside a $500 million share repurchase program, while AI-driven threats enhanced Falcon platform uptake. CRWD's positioning against competitors like PANW and FTNT improved, marked by record net new annual recurring revenue (ARR). In my view, the cumulative effect of these upgrades and partnerships has overshadowed prior worries about growth deceleration. [...] ## What's Next for CRWD: Key Forecast Drivers to Monitor Looking ahead, the Q1 FY2027 earnings release on June 3 will be critical for insights into revenue growth, ARR expansion, and guidance, particularly with AI security demand in focus. Broader trends, such as rising AI-powered threats and platform convergence, could sway sentiment. Macro influences like interest rates and enterprise IT budgets remain relevant....

evidences.title: Piper Sandler reiterates CrowdStrike stock rating on demand outlook
evidences.content: © Reuters In this article: CRWD+0.41% Investing.com - Piper Sandler reiterated an Overweight rating and $750.00 price target on CrowdStrike (NASDAQ:CRWD) shares. The cybersecurity company, valued at $171 billion, currently trades at $672.61, though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued relative to its Fair Value. The analyst target aligns with a broader Wall Street consensus, where 27 analysts have recently revised their earnings estimates upward. The firm hosted investor meetings with CFO Burt Podbere and VP of IR Andy Nowinski in Toronto this week. Discussions focused on pipeline build and recent demand inflection resulting from Mythos and Project Glasswing, alongside Falcon Flex, identity, endpoint, and drivers for further leverage in the business. [...] "We came away incrementally more confident in the company’s ability to execute on the opportunity, with Mythos clearly driving a stepfunction change for security prioritization and spending," the analyst wrote. The firm believes CrowdStrike’s broad platform positions it well to deliver security outcomes while lowering total cost of ownership for customers. The company’s financial strength supports this vi...

evidences.title: CrowdStrike "Underappreciated?" Analyst Sees CRWD Sell-Off "Overdone" into Earnings
evidences.content: # CrowdStrike "Underappreciated?" Analyst Sees CRWD Sell-Off "Overdone" into Earnings ## Schwab Network 326000 subscribers 38 likes ### Description 4794 views Posted: 2 Mar 2026 CrowdStrike (CRWD) reports earnings Tuesday, and Marley Kayden covers the latest analyst notes ahead of the release. Piper Sandler thinks the sell-off of the stock is “well overdone” and calls it best-in-class as cybersecurity needs are expected to ramp during the AI revolution. @ProsperTradingAcademy's Charles Moon offers an example options trade, warning that stocks in this sector can sell off even on good reports. [...] execute warrant this premium. As investors wade back into the space, we expect them to turn to leadership first. And they believe CrowdStrike is that leader. Delving deeper, the analyst went on to say that he believes AI is an opportunity for CrowdStrike and not a replacement. It shouldn't be caught up in the air here, he says. It should simultaneously create the next multibillion dollar security opportunity as enterprises look to secure a new attack surface. He thinks that leaders like CrowdStrike are well positioned to capture that opportunity over the coming years. There's another a...

evidences.title: CrowdStrike (CRWD) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
evidences.content: #### Bears say CrowdStrike Holdings is facing increased competition in the cybersecurity market and a potential decline in its financial performance due to hiring a Chief AI and Autonomous Systems Officer and plans to invest in new AI models. With a guidance for annual recurring revenue (ARR) of $5,792.6-5,794.6M and operating income of $345.6-$349.1M, it is unlikely that the company will meet its own projections or those of analysts. The company's high valuation based on a FY2028E EV/Revenue multiple of 27.6x, compared to the industry average of 11.4x, also raises concerns about the sustainability of its growth and profitability model, which relies heavily on acquisitions and a product-led strategy. [...] Buy 42% Hold 19% Sell 0% Strong Sell 0% #### Bulls say CrowdStrike Holdings is expected to continue its positive momentum with the launch of its new products and partnerships with major industry players. The recent inflection point in the security landscape triggered by the adoption of AI by enterprises has created a significant demand for CrowdStrike's Falcon platform. The company's unique single-agent architecture and expanding control plane across cloud, identity, and SIEM...

evidences.content: Dividends As discussed under "Dividend Policy" above, we do not currently expect to make distributions on our Class A common stock. In the event that we do make distributions of cash or other property, those distributions will constitute dividends for U.S. federal income tax purposes to the extent paid from our current or accumulated earnings and profits, as determined under U.S. federal income tax principles. To the extent those distributions exceed our current and accumulated earnings and profits, they will constitute a return of capital, which will first reduce your basis in our Class A common stock, but not below zero, and then will be treated as gain from the sale of our Class A common stock, as described below under "—Gain on Disposition of Our Class A Common Stock."
